TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == FAIRY TAIL muo-daw masakapahay FAIRY TAIL ť≠ĒŚįéŚįĎŚĻī == "FAIRY TAIL muo-daw masakapahay" Dipung a kamu: FAIRY TAILÔľŹ„Éē„āß„āĘ„É™„Éľ„ÉÜ„ā§„Éę, ci Cin-taw-haw kini misangaay tu Ci-hun masasiningay a manggaan, itidacn i "masasiningay a cudad Magazine" tusa malebut mihcaan tulu a bataan idaw ku lima nu bangguan katukuh i tusa malabut cacay a bataan idaw ku pitu mihcaan tulu a bataan idaw kusepat nu nikatulinan a bangguan, masacacayay a nika tahekalan pulung han enem a bataan idaw ku tulu nu cudadan. sakalecad nu nipisumadan tu nu tilibu mutiyungay tu sakacacay itida i tusa a malebut idaw ku siwa mihcaan cacay a bataan bulad sabaw tusa demiad katukuh tu tusa malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku tulu mihcaan tulu bulad tulu bataan demiad patahekal i tilibi. "FAIRY TAIL Magazine"2006ŚĻī35 . sakatusa itida i tusa malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku sepat mihcaan sepat bulad lima demiad katukuh tusa malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku enem mihcaan tulu bulad tusa a bataan idaw ku enem demiad a patahekal i tilubi. sakatulu " FAIRY TAIL ina muo-daw masakapahay nu sadikuday a cudadan" itida i tusa malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku walu mihcaan cacay a bataan bulad pitu demiad katukuh tusa malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku siwa mihcaan siwa bulad tusa bataan idaw ku siwa demiad itida i Tukiw tilibian atu matulinay nu aadihan nu tilibian a patahekal, itida i Dipun nu hekalan a patahekal miadih, idaw ku dumaay nu tusaay mutiyungay a gagagikian. nu layak a nipisulitan han u " muo-daw masakapahay" , ina ka kungkuan musakamu tu Muo-taw-se kunhuy. kikul nu di'tu a tademaw ci Na-ce, Ha-pi, Lu-si atu duma a cabayan, hicaen a misaicelang, sakaycabay atu nikaydaan tu utiihay, demecen milawpes tu kitakiday nu tabakiay a bauan. Á¨¨2 .Á¨¨3śúü"FAIRY TAIL . ina misulitay ci Cen-daw-haw itida i " Sen-se-wawa" nipicuduhan tu tanayuay matulinay nu cudadan. sakay matulinay nu mangaan " FAIRY TAIL muo-daw masakapahay tu lasubuan a kawaan "„Éē„āß„āĘ„É™„Éľ„ÉÜ„ā§„Éę 100ŚĻī„āĮ„ā®„āĻ„Éą" u misulitay a tademaw ku sisikiningay misulit ci Cen-taw-haw, kakenisan misasing , ci Sang-ten-tun-hu kina mikulitay namaka tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku walu mihcaan pitu bulad tusa bataan idaw ku lima demiad malingatu musa kuamu tu secisia nu APP nika lingatuan katukuh ayda, tu anu cila nu pilipayan a sakatulu demiad misumad tu cacayay nu sasakamuen, patahekal misingding papalahad. ayda tahekalay nu cudadan makaala tu siwa a cudadan, i Taywan nu sulitan u Tunli ku patahekalay tina cudadan, mikaysiakuay han ci U-li-cen. cacay nu di'di'tuan a kitakidan Ya-w-lan-de "Earth Land", yadah i tida ku sapabeli tu Muo-taw-se sapasiwkay tu kawaw nu sakapulungan nu Muo-taw-se' kunhuy, itida i Huy-o-lei-wankuo nu micidekay nu katal a Muo-taw-se yenci nu Muo-taw-se' kunhuy nu sikilulay nu lalimenah "Fairy Tail", cacay ci Sin-lin-muo-taw-se' limucedan ci Lu-si. Ha-te'-huy-li-ya mangalay papilabu tu kikul nu lalimenah. itida ci nida i milawpesay tu tabakiay nu bauan ci Muo-taw-se siningan ci Na-ce. Tuo-la-ke-ni-e aci Ha-pi anililidan, tada ma'dem tu ku nabalucu'an ni Lu-si micumud tu i kikul nu lalimenah yadah ku katinengan tu micidekay nu katal a Muo-taw-se', sisa ci Lu-si aci Na-ce atu Ha-pi mikilul tu sikikulay nu lalimenah a cabayan ci Ke-lei, Ay-e-sa, Wen-ti, Sia-lu-lu atu i kunhuyay a cabayan malingatu mitahaw ku nipiliwkuan. . natangahan ŚČĶšĹú yu mahedek tu ku nipisulitan Rave Master sa, saan ci Cen-taw-han tina kakungkuan sakalaluman sa, sisa mangalay ci nida tu tina manggaan u malaluwaluwahay a kungkuan. ina sasulitan nida namakayda i nikalalipahan nu cabay nida i pacupiyaway. idaw ku nipisulitan tu sakay siningan tu nikatepaan nu heni a kawawan, patinaku u kawaw. ci Cen-taw itida nipikulitan i tusamalebut idaw ku tusa mihcaan siwa bulad tulu demiad itida i ' "Frsh" cudadan nu masacacayay a " nu wawaan a sasakamuan". nika tulinan a kakungkuan namakayda i kalamkamay nu palasitay tu tuu'dan a kakulian micukamas tu silamalay nu lalimenah a tademaw ci Kun-na-ce, idaw ku nipiala nida tu canancanan nu tuu'dan a mikawaw. Śú®ŚģĆśąźšļÜšĻčŚČćÁöĄšĹúŚďĀ Rave Master "Fresh" . ci Mashima idaw ku ni simsiman nida tu caayay kalecad nu mapalaway itida i tataydaan midang nu nidatengan, kakilulkilul sa ku nipidatengan itini tu i punu', sisa pacician nida ku misulitay a tademaw namakayda i sin-se sumada han tu u mapalaway. ya tapang nu cudad naw " Tale" sumad han "Tail", nipatuduan sa u FAIRY TAIL muo-daw masakapahay, ina misulitay a tademaw saan tu hakiya caay hakiya maluce ku " malucekay". saan ci Cen-taw, amica mangalay ci nida itida i " FAIRY TAIL muo-daw masakapahay" misimsim tu sakalihalay nu udip atu nu katuuday a lihalay, nika u katuuday ku han nida. Mashima .ś®ôť°ĆÁĒĪ"Tale"śĒĻÁāļ"Tail",śĆáÁöĄśėĮFAIRY TAIL "FAIRY TAIL . misulitay ci Kung-ye-tase aci FAIRY TAIL muo-daw masakapahay sa, u ziwsiw ni Cen-taw cacay tuway, yamikulitay saan, tatengan ina tatuluan nu baluhay a tademaw hicaen hakiya a mitulin tu sakacacay nu mihcaan a utiihay nu kawawan. ci Mashima saan itini i tusa a malebut idaw ku walu nu natangahan nida a misulit tu FAIRY TAIL muo-daw masakapahay tu paypay lipay nu nipianpayan, cacay a lalipayan nu sayaway a demiad misulit tu cudad atu kakungkuan, sakatusa a demiad misinanut tu sulit, sakatulu a demiad katukuh tu sakalima a demiad pail utu nipikulitan, duyu' han tu u mahicaay nu miadupay a tademaw ci Aw-la-ci, nu bulad a cudadan ci Cen-taw milecad tu a misulit. yu nipisulitan nida tu pei'zi milecad tu a misimsim tu baluhay a sasulitan. ci Mashima itida i tusa a malebut idaw ku walu nu mihcaan idaw ku enemay nida a ziwsiwan, itida ku nu heni misakakawaw i walu nu malebutan a kitidaan misulit makaala ku nu heni tu enema a demiadan misakakawaw, idaw ku pituay nu takalan, idaw ku punyi atu sasalamaan tu tilibian. tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku cacay nu mihcaan , saan ci nida paypilipilipayan enem a demiad ci nida a misakakawaw, sabaw pitu sa ku tuki nida a misakakawaw tu demidemiad. Śú®ŚČĶšĹúÁčāťáéŚ§ßŚłęŚíĆFAIRY TAIL .Mashima "FAIRY TAIL .Mashima Śú® 2008 17ŚįŹśôā. misuayaw tina cudadan, ci Cen-taw cukaymasen nida ku katinengananay a tademaw. patideng tu Natse atu Igneel nu kalaluwamaan, Mashima micukaymas ci nida tu nikapatayan nu wamanida. makayda ci nida i cabay nida a matineng tu nikasinawal mikacaw tu kadideng, kacaw sa henay ku nu heni tu nipisuyan tu kadideng, imelang tu ci nida. pangangan sa tu nganganasa, ina misulitay a tademaw saan tu nu Amilikaay a nipangangan pasayda i Dipun nu miadihay tina cudadan inayi' ku matinengay sa, sisa mipili' ci nida tu nu laluday nu Dipun a nganganan, Na-ce. Mashima singbungkisya ci Jason misumad tu Amilika nu manggaan nu midaduyay a tademaw Jason Thompson, nikudanay tu tusa a malebut idaw ku walu mihcaan nu Sen-ti-ya-ke i nipatinakuan tu mutiyungay nu manggaan itida a mahumun ci nida, duma sa sumaden tu Del Rey Manga nu cacayay a misakakawaway a tademaw, FAIRY TAIL muo-daw masakapahay nu kalingatuan nu pei-mem pacakayay tu cudada. kilul han nida ku nikaudip tu demidemiadan atu ziwsiw nida tu sakalaluwaluwah nu kamuan ku sakay laluwahan nu sulitan. Natsu ŚíĆ Igneel šĻčťĖďÁöĄÁą∂Ś≠źťóúšŅāśôā,Mashima Natsu .Mashima ŚįáŤ®ėŤÄÖŤßíŤČ≤ Jason Jason Thompson , Del Rey Manga ÁöĄšłÄŚźćŚď°Ś∑•,FAIRY TAIL .

mar~…ĺar~…ĺuwar~…ĺuwańßaj a kuŇčkuan. ina sasur~…ĺitan nida namakajda i nikar~…ĺar~…ĺipańßan nu ¶abaj nida i pa ¶upijawaj. idaw ku nipisur~…ĺitan tu sakaj siniŇčan tu nikat…ôpaan nu ńß…ôni a kawawan, patinaku u kawaw. ¶i ¶…ôn-taw itida nipikur~…ĺitan i tusamar~…ĺ…ôbut idaw ku tusa mińß ¶aan siwa bur~…ĺad tur~…ĺu d…ômiad itida i Ē~ ° "frsńß" ¶udadan nu masa ¶a ¶ajaj a " nu wawaan a sasakamuan". nika tur~…ĺinan a kakuŇčkuan namakajda i kar~…ĺamkamaj nu par~…ĺasitaj tu tuu Ē~ °dan a kakur~…ĺian mi ¶ukamas tu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ônańß a tad…ômaw ¶i kun-na- ¶…ô, idaw ku nipiar~…ĺa nida tu ¶anan ¶anan nu tuu Ē~ °dan a mikawaw. ********* *a*…ô mast…ôr "fr…ôsńß" . ¶i masńßima idaw ku ni simsiman nida tu ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu mapar~…ĺawaj itida i tatajdaan midaŇč nu nidat…ôŇčan, kakir~…ĺur~…ĺkir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa ku nipidat…ôŇčan itini tu i punu Ē~ °, sisa pa ¶i ¶ian nida ku misur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw namakajda i sin-s…ô sumada ńßan tu u mapar~…ĺawaj. ja tapaŇč nu ¶udad naw " tar~…ĺ…ô" sumad ńßan "tair~…ĺ", nipatuduan sa u fai*j tair~…ĺ muo-daw masakapańßaj, ina misur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw saan tu ńßakija ¶aaj ńßakija mar~…ĺu ¶…ô ku " mar~…ĺu ¶…ôkaj". saan ¶i ¶…ôn-taw, ami ¶a maŇčar~…ĺaj ¶i nida itida i " fai*j tair~…ĺ muo-daw masakapańßaj" misimsim tu sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj nu udip atu nu katuudaj a r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj, nika u katuudaj ku ńßan nida. masńßima .***"tar~…ĺ…ô"**"tair~…ĺ",***fai*j tair~…ĺ "fai*j tair~…ĺ . misur~…ĺitaj ¶i kuŇč-j…ô-tas…ô a ¶i fai*j tair~…ĺ muo-daw masakapańßaj sa, u ziwsiw ni ¶…ôn-taw ¶a ¶aj tuwaj, jamikur~…ĺitaj saan, tat…ôŇčan ina tatur~…ĺuan nu bar~…ĺuńßaj a tad…ômaw ńßi ¶a…ôn ńßakija a mitur~…ĺin tu saka ¶a ¶aj nu mińß ¶aan a utiińßaj nu kawawan. ¶i masńßima saan itini i tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut idaw ku war~…ĺu nu nataŇčańßan nida a misur~…ĺit tu fai*j tair~…ĺ muo-daw masakapańßaj tu pajpaj r~…ĺipaj nu nipianpajan, ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺar~…ĺipajan nu sajawaj a d…ômiad misur~…ĺit tu ¶udad atu kakuŇčkuan, sakatusa a d…ômiad misinanut tu sur~…ĺit, sakatur~…ĺu a d…ômiad katukuńß tu sakar~…ĺima a d…ômiad pair~…ĺ utu nipikur~…ĺitan, duju Ē~ ° ńßan tu u mańßi ¶aaj nu miadupaj a tad…ômaw ¶i aw-r~…ĺa- ¶i, nu bur~…ĺad a ¶udadan ¶i ¶…ôn-taw mir~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu a misur~…ĺit. ju nipisur~…ĺitan nida tu p…ôi Ē~ °zi mir~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu a misimsim tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a sasur~…ĺitan. ¶i masńßima itida i tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut idaw ku war~…ĺu nu mińß ¶aan idaw ku …ôn…ômaj nida a ziwsiwan, itida ku nu ńß…ôni misakakawaw i war~…ĺu nu mar~…ĺ…ôbutan a kitidaan misur~…ĺit makaar~…ĺa ku nu ńß…ôni tu …ôn…ôma a d…ômiadan misakakawaw, idaw ku pituaj nu takar~…ĺan, idaw ku punji atu sasar~…ĺamaan tu tir~…ĺibian. tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku ¶a ¶aj nu mińß ¶aan , saan ¶i nida pajpir~…ĺipir~…ĺipajan …ôn…ôm a d…ômiad ¶i nida a misakakawaw, sabaw pitu sa ku tuki nida a misakakawaw tu d…ômid…ômiad. ********fai*j tair~…ĺ .masńßima "fai*j tair~…ĺ .masńßima * **** ****. misuajaw tina ¶udadan, ¶i ¶…ôn-taw ¶ukajmas…ôn nida ku katin…ôŇčananaj a tad…ômaw. patid…ôŇč tu nats…ô atu ign…ô…ôr~…ĺ nu kar~…ĺar~…ĺuwamaan, masńßima mi ¶ukajmas ¶i nida tu nikapatajan nu wamanida. makajda ¶i nida i ¶abaj nida a matin…ôŇč tu nikasinawar~…ĺ mika ¶aw tu kadid…ôŇč, ka ¶aw sa ńß…ônaj ku nu ńß…ôni tu nipisujan tu kadid…ôŇč, im…ôr~…ĺaŇč tu ¶i nida. paŇčaŇčan sa tu ŇčaŇčanasa, ina misur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw saan tu nu amir~…ĺikaaj a nipaŇčaŇčan pasajda i dipun nu miadińßaj tina ¶udadan inaji Ē~ ° ku matin…ôŇčaj sa, sisa mipir~…ĺi Ē~ ° ¶i nida tu nu r~…ĺar~…ĺudaj nu dipun a ŇčaŇčanan, na- ¶…ô. masńßima siŇčbuŇčkisja ¶i *ason misumad tu amir~…ĺika nu maŇčgaan nu midadujaj a tad…ômaw *ason tńßompson, nikudanaj tu tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut idaw ku war~…ĺu mińß ¶aan nu s…ôn-ti-ja-k…ô i nipatinakuan tu mutijuŇčaj nu maŇčgaan itida a mańßumun ¶i nida, duma sa sumad…ôn tu d…ôr~…ĺ *…ô maŇča nu ¶a ¶ajaj a misakakawawaj a tad…ômaw, fai*j tair~…ĺ muo-daw masakapańßaj nu kar~…ĺiŇčatuan nu p…ôi-m…ôm pa ¶akajaj tu ¶udada. kir~…ĺur~…ĺ ńßan nida ku nikaudip tu d…ômid…ômiadan atu ziwsiw nida tu sakar~…ĺar~…ĺuwar~…ĺuwańß nu kamuan ku sakaj r~…ĺar~…ĺuwańßan nu sur~…ĺitan. natsu * ign…ô…ôr~…ĺ ********,masńßima natsu .masńßima ***** *ason *ason tńßompson , d…ôr~…ĺ *…ô maŇča *****,fai*j tair~…ĺ .
S.FORM: == FAIRY TAIL muo-daw masakapahay FAIRY TAIL ť≠ĒŚįéŚįĎŚĻī == "FAIRY TAIL muo-daw masakapahay" Dipung a kamu: FAIRY TAILÔľŹ„Éē„āß„āĘ„É™„Éľ„ÉÜ„ā§„Éę, ci Cin-taw-haw kini misangaay tu Ci-hun masasiningay a manggaan, itidacn i "masasiningay a cudad Magazine" tusa malebut mihcaan tulu a bataan idaw ku lima nu bangguan katukuh i tusa malabut cacay a bataan idaw ku pitu mihcaan tulu a bataan idaw kusepat nu nikatulinan a bangguan, masacacayay a nika tahekalan pulung han enem a bataan idaw ku tulu nu cudadan. sakalecad nu nipisumadan tu nu tilibu mutiyungay tu sakacacay itida i tusa a malebut idaw ku siwa mihcaan cacay a bataan bulad sabaw tusa demiad katukuh tu tusa malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku tulu mihcaan tulu bulad tulu bataan demiad patahekal i tilibi. "FAIRY TAIL Magazine"2006ŚĻī35 . sakatusa itida i tusa malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku sepat mihcaan sepat bulad lima demiad katukuh tusa malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku enem mihcaan tulu bulad tusa a bataan idaw ku enem demiad a patahekal i tilubi. sakatulu " FAIRY TAIL ina muo-daw masakapahay nu sadikuday a cudadan" itida i tusa malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku walu mihcaan cacay a bataan bulad pitu demiad katukuh tusa malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku siwa mihcaan siwa bulad tusa bataan idaw ku siwa demiad itida i Tukiw tilibian atu matulinay nu aadihan nu tilibian a patahekal, itida i Dipun nu hekalan a patahekal miadih, idaw ku dumaay nu tusaay mutiyungay a gagagikian. nu layak a nipisulitan han u " muo-daw masakapahay" , ina ka kungkuan musakamu tu Muo-taw-se kunhuy. kikul nu di'tu a tademaw ci Na-ce, Ha-pi, Lu-si atu duma a cabayan, hicaen a misaicelang, sakaycabay atu nikaydaan tu utiihay, demecen milawpes tu kitakiday nu tabakiay a bauan. Á¨¨2 .Á¨¨3śúü"FAIRY TAIL . ina misulitay ci Cen-daw-haw itida i " Sen-se-wawa" nipicuduhan tu tanayuay matulinay nu cudadan. sakay matulinay nu mangaan " FAIRY TAIL muo-daw masakapahay tu lasubuan a kawaan "„Éē„āß„āĘ„É™„Éľ„ÉÜ„ā§„Éę 100ŚĻī„āĮ„ā®„āĻ„Éą" u misulitay a tademaw ku sisikiningay misulit ci Cen-taw-haw, kakenisan misasing , ci Sang-ten-tun-hu kina mikulitay namaka tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku walu mihcaan pitu bulad tusa bataan idaw ku lima demiad malingatu musa kuamu tu secisia nu APP nika lingatuan katukuh ayda, tu anu cila nu pilipayan a sakatulu demiad misumad tu cacayay nu sasakamuen, patahekal misingding papalahad. ayda tahekalay nu cudadan makaala tu siwa a cudadan, i Taywan nu sulitan u Tunli ku patahekalay tina cudadan, mikaysiakuay han ci U-li-cen. cacay nu di'di'tuan a kitakidan Ya-w-lan-de "Earth Land", yadah i tida ku sapabeli tu Muo-taw-se sapasiwkay tu kawaw nu sakapulungan nu Muo-taw-se' kunhuy, itida i Huy-o-lei-wankuo nu micidekay nu katal a Muo-taw-se yenci nu Muo-taw-se' kunhuy nu sikilulay nu lalimenah "Fairy Tail", cacay ci Sin-lin-muo-taw-se' limucedan ci Lu-si. Ha-te'-huy-li-ya mangalay papilabu tu kikul nu lalimenah. itida ci nida i milawpesay tu tabakiay nu bauan ci Muo-taw-se siningan ci Na-ce. Tuo-la-ke-ni-e aci Ha-pi anililidan, tada ma'dem tu ku nabalucu'an ni Lu-si micumud tu i kikul nu lalimenah yadah ku katinengan tu micidekay nu katal a Muo-taw-se', sisa ci Lu-si aci Na-ce atu Ha-pi mikilul tu sikikulay nu lalimenah a cabayan ci Ke-lei, Ay-e-sa, Wen-ti, Sia-lu-lu atu i kunhuyay a cabayan malingatu mitahaw ku nipiliwkuan. . natangahan ŚČĶšĹú yu mahedek tu ku nipisulitan Rave Master sa, saan ci Cen-taw-han tina kakungkuan sakalaluman sa, sisa mangalay ci nida tu tina manggaan u malaluwaluwahay a kungkuan. ina sasulitan nida namakayda i nikalalipahan nu cabay nida i pacupiyaway. idaw ku nipisulitan tu sakay siningan tu nikatepaan nu heni a kawawan, patinaku u kawaw. ci Cen-taw itida nipikulitan i tusamalebut idaw ku tusa mihcaan siwa bulad tulu demiad itida i ' "Frsh" cudadan nu masacacayay a " nu wawaan a sasakamuan". nika tulinan a kakungkuan namakayda i kalamkamay nu palasitay tu tuu'dan a kakulian micukamas tu silamalay nu lalimenah a tademaw ci Kun-na-ce, idaw ku nipiala nida tu canancanan nu tuu'dan a mikawaw. Śú®ŚģĆśąźšļÜšĻčŚČćÁöĄšĹúŚďĀ Rave Master "Fresh" . ci Mashima idaw ku ni simsiman nida tu caayay kalecad nu mapalaway itida i tataydaan midang nu nidatengan, kakilulkilul sa ku nipidatengan itini tu i punu', sisa pacician nida ku misulitay a tademaw namakayda i sin-se sumada han tu u mapalaway. ya tapang nu cudad naw " Tale" sumad han "Tail", nipatuduan sa u FAIRY TAIL muo-daw masakapahay, ina misulitay a tademaw saan tu hakiya caay hakiya maluce ku " malucekay". saan ci Cen-taw, amica mangalay ci nida itida i " FAIRY TAIL muo-daw masakapahay" misimsim tu sakalihalay nu udip atu nu katuuday a lihalay, nika u katuuday ku han nida. Mashima .ś®ôť°ĆÁĒĪ"Tale"śĒĻÁāļ"Tail",śĆáÁöĄśėĮFAIRY TAIL "FAIRY TAIL . misulitay ci Kung-ye-tase aci FAIRY TAIL muo-daw masakapahay sa, u ziwsiw ni Cen-taw cacay tuway, yamikulitay saan, tatengan ina tatuluan nu baluhay a tademaw hicaen hakiya a mitulin tu sakacacay nu mihcaan a utiihay nu kawawan. ci Mashima saan itini i tusa a malebut idaw ku walu nu natangahan nida a misulit tu FAIRY TAIL muo-daw masakapahay tu paypay lipay nu nipianpayan, cacay a lalipayan nu sayaway a demiad misulit tu cudad atu kakungkuan, sakatusa a demiad misinanut tu sulit, sakatulu a demiad katukuh tu sakalima a demiad pail utu nipikulitan, duyu' han tu u mahicaay nu miadupay a tademaw ci Aw-la-ci, nu bulad a cudadan ci Cen-taw milecad tu a misulit. yu nipisulitan nida tu pei'zi milecad tu a misimsim tu baluhay a sasulitan. ci Mashima itida i tusa a malebut idaw ku walu nu mihcaan idaw ku enemay nida a ziwsiwan, itida ku nu heni misakakawaw i walu nu malebutan a kitidaan misulit makaala ku nu heni tu enema a demiadan misakakawaw, idaw ku pituay nu takalan, idaw ku punyi atu sasalamaan tu tilibian. tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku cacay nu mihcaan , saan ci nida paypilipilipayan enem a demiad ci nida a misakakawaw, sabaw pitu sa ku tuki nida a misakakawaw tu demidemiad. Śú®ŚČĶšĹúÁčāťáéŚ§ßŚłęŚíĆFAIRY TAIL .Mashima "FAIRY TAIL .Mashima Śú® 2008 17ŚįŹśôā. misuayaw tina cudadan, ci Cen-taw cukaymasen nida ku katinengananay a tademaw. patideng tu Natse atu Igneel nu kalaluwamaan, Mashima micukaymas ci nida tu nikapatayan nu wamanida. makayda ci nida i cabay nida a matineng tu nikasinawal mikacaw tu kadideng, kacaw sa henay ku nu heni tu nipisuyan tu kadideng, imelang tu ci nida. pangangan sa tu nganganasa, ina misulitay a tademaw saan tu nu Amilikaay a nipangangan pasayda i Dipun nu miadihay tina cudadan inayi' ku matinengay sa, sisa mipili' ci nida tu nu laluday nu Dipun a nganganan, Na-ce. Mashima singbungkisya ci Jason misumad tu Amilika nu manggaan nu midaduyay a tademaw Jason Thompson, nikudanay tu tusa a malebut idaw ku walu mihcaan nu Sen-ti-ya-ke i nipatinakuan tu mutiyungay nu manggaan itida a mahumun ci nida, duma sa sumaden tu Del Rey Manga nu cacayay a misakakawaway a tademaw, FAIRY TAIL muo-daw masakapahay nu kalingatuan nu pei-mem pacakayay tu cudada. kilul han nida ku nikaudip tu demidemiadan atu ziwsiw nida tu sakalaluwaluwah nu kamuan ku sakay laluwahan nu sulitan. Natsu ŚíĆ Igneel šĻčťĖďÁöĄÁą∂Ś≠źťóúšŅāśôā,Mashima Natsu .Mashima ŚįáŤ®ėŤÄÖŤßíŤČ≤ Jason Jason Thompson , Del Rey Manga ÁöĄšłÄŚźćŚď°Ś∑•,FAIRY TAIL .

sabaw pitu sa ku tuki nida a misakakawaw tu d…ômid…ômiad. ********fai*j tair~…ĺ .masńßima "fai*j tair~…ĺ .masńßima * **** ****. misuajaw tina ¶udadan, ¶i ¶…ôn-taw ¶ukajmas…ôn nida ku katin…ôŇčananaj a tad…ômaw. patid…ôŇč tu nats…ô atu ign…ô…ôr~…ĺ nu kar~…ĺar~…ĺuwamaan, masńßima mi ¶ukajmas ¶i nida tu nikapatajan nu wamanida. makajda ¶i nida i ¶abaj nida a matin…ôŇč tu nikasinawar~…ĺ mika ¶aw tu kadid…ôŇč, ka ¶aw sa ńß…ônaj ku nu ńß…ôni tu nipisujan tu kadid…ôŇč, im…ôr~…ĺaŇč tu ¶i nida. paŇčaŇčan sa tu ŇčaŇčanasa, ina misur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw saan tu nu amir~…ĺikaaj a nipaŇčaŇčan pasajda i dipun nu miadińßaj tina ¶udadan inaji Ē~ ° ku matin…ôŇčaj sa, sisa mipir~…ĺi Ē~ ° ¶i nida tu nu r~…ĺar~…ĺudaj nu dipun a ŇčaŇčanan, na- ¶…ô. masńßima siŇčbuŇčkisja ¶i *ason misumad tu amir~…ĺika nu maŇčgaan nu midadujaj a tad…ômaw *ason tńßompson, nikudanaj tu tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut idaw ku war~…ĺu mińß ¶aan nu s…ôn-ti-ja-k…ô i nipatinakuan tu mutijuŇčaj nu maŇčgaan itida a mańßumun ¶i nida, duma sa sumad…ôn tu d…ôr~…ĺ *…ô maŇča nu ¶a ¶ajaj a misakakawawaj a tad…ômaw, fai*j tair~…ĺ muo-daw masakapańßaj nu kar~…ĺiŇčatuan nu p…ôi-m…ôm pa ¶akajaj tu ¶udada. kir~…ĺur~…ĺ ńßan nida ku nikaudip tu
